result.summary: The page mostly renders correctly, but there are clear layout issues where content is clipped by the viewport and the bottom navigation overlaps the game grid. These make some games partially inaccessible on this screen size.

issues.description: The game grid on the right side is cut off, with the third column of tiles only partially visible instead of fitting within the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid breakpoints, card widths, or side padding so all columns fit cleanly within the available screen width without clipping.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game content, obscuring the bottom row of tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the page content or reduce the footer height so the last row remains fully visible above the sticky nav.
